classification.rationale: The context explicitly sets Type: research. The goal is a comprehensive quality audit and improvement roadmap for the BLS transit-search pipeline — no code changes, only analysis and recommendations.

codebase_snapshot.folder_structure:
src/exohunt/
  bls.py, cache.py, cli.py, comparison.py, config.py, ingest.py, models.py,
  parameters.py, pipeline.py, plotting.py, preprocess.py, progress.py, vetting.py
  presets/ (quicklook.toml, science-default.toml, deep-search.toml)
tests/ (test_smoke.py, test_config.py, test_cli.py, test_analysis_modules.py)
codebase_snapshot.summary: Python 3.10+ exoplanet transit-search pipeline using lightkurve, astropy, numpy, matplotlib. 13 source files, 4 test files, 3 presets.
